holdings.infoBox: WCAP is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are TransDigm Group stock at 5.20%, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation at 4.82%, Arista Networks at 4.69%, Alphabet at 4.54%, and Tesla at 4.48%.

overview.description: The WarCap Unconstrained Equity ETF (WCAP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital growth by actively managing a narrow portfolio of companies across all market capitalization worldwide. The funds selection process uses an unconstrained approach that combines macroeconomic analysis and bottom-up fundamental research. WCAP was launched on Sep 11, 2025 and is issued by WarCap.
